overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character walking through the ancient Greek city of Thasos at night. The character traverses the agora marketplace, ascends stone staircases, passes colossal Atlas statues, and enters the Champion's Gymnasium, transitioning from open moonlit plazas to covered passages and finally to an open training courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient agora marketplace with stone buildings and fire braziers

events.description: NPC in red robes walks past the camera from left to right and exits frame
character begins ascending stone steps at the far end of the agora

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the moonlit agora, passing by a robed NPC and approaching a stone staircase

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking in same direction then passing by the camera and exiting right

entered.detail: covered stone structure with columns and fire braziers
ancient stone building with tiled roof and lit interior
large stone statue of a robed figure holding a staff
tall stone obelisk or column in the distance
burning fire pit providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the moonlit Thasos Agora, passing stone buildings and fire braziers. A robed NPC walks past on the left and exits the frame as the character approaches a stone staircase at the far end of the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending from agora to upper city level with planters

events.description: character reaches top of initial staircase and enters upper plaza area with planters
character turns slightly right while continuing to ascend secondary steps

agents.ego_description: climbing stone steps leading up from the agora, passing large planters with palm fronds and trees

entered.detail: low stone wall with large potted plants and palm fronds
tree with distinctive red autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: The character ascends wide stone stairs leaving the main agora behind, passing stone planters with lush vegetation. The path curves slightly as it climbs toward the upper level of the city, with the olive tree and red-leaved tree becoming prominent on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial plaza with colossal Atlas statues flanking the entrance to the gymnasium

events.description: UI location changes to Thasos City as character enters plaza with colossal statues
character walks between two massive stone statues and approaches the columned entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand plaza between two colossal statues holding spheres, approaching the gymnasium entrance

entered.detail: colossal stone statue of a figure holding a sphere aloft on left side of path
colossal stone statue of a figure holding a sphere aloft on right side of path
grand columned entrance with triangular pediment and hanging garlands

segments.scene_description: Entering the Thasos City area, the character walks between two massive Atlas statues holding stone spheres, approaching the grand columned entrance of the Champion's Gymnasium. The red-leaved tree remains visible on the right as the character moves toward the covered gateway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered entrance corridor of the gymnasium with hanging vines and ascending stairs

events.description: character passes through the columned entrance into a covered stone corridor with hanging garlands
character ascends the stairs and approaches the exit back into open air, lighting brightens

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered gateway of the gymnasium, ascending the interior staircase toward the courtyard

entered.detail: roofed stone corridor with hanging vine garlands and potted plants on pedestals
wide stone staircase ascending through the gateway

segments.scene_description: The character enters the Champion's Gymnasium through a covered stone gateway adorned with hanging garlands, ascending the interior stairs. The environment shifts from open moonlight to enclosed artificial lighting, then brightens again as the character approaches the exit to the courtyard above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open training courtyard of the Champion's Gymnasium with surrounding colonnades and mountain views

events.description: character emerges from the covered stairs into the open courtyard of the gymnasium
character turns right and walks along the perimeter of the courtyard

agents.ego_description: exploring the open courtyard of the gymnasium, walking along the perimeter and observing the surrounding colonnade buildings

entered.detail: large open circular courtyard with stone paving
long building with columns and blue decorative banners
distant mountain peak visible against the sky
circular patterned stone design in the courtyard center

segments.scene_description: Emerging into the Champion's Gymnasium courtyard, the character finds a large open area surrounded by colonnaded buildings with blue banners. The camera pans to show the circular mosaic floor pattern and distant mountains as the character walks along the right perimeter of the training ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit city plaza that gradually ascends into a lush, elevated district. It begins in the Thasos Agora, where the character walks past stone buildings and glowing fire braziers as a robed figure crosses their path. As the character reaches the far end of the plaza, the scene shifts from the open marketplace toward a wide stone staircase. The camera then follows the ascent up these stairs, leaving the main agora behind while passing stone planters filled with greenery. The path curves upward toward the city's upper level, finally bringing an olive tree and a red-leaved tree into prominent view on the right.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the moonlit outskirts of Thasos into the enclosed and then open training grounds of the Champion's Gymnasium. It begins as the character walks between two massive Atlas statues holding stone spheres, passing a red-leaved tree while approaching a grand columned entrance. As the character moves through the covered stone gateway adorned with hanging garlands, the environment shifts from open moonlight to enclosed artificial lighting while ascending interior stairs. The scene then opens up as the character emerges from the passage into a large courtyard surrounded by colonnaded buildings and blue banners. Finally, the camera pans across a circular mosaic floor toward distant mountains as the character walks along the right perimeter of the training ground.
